	Sada šálků na espresso ORION Decora obsahuje dva kusy šálků s podšálky. Jsou vyrobeny z tenkostěnného, ale odolného porcelánu, který doplňuje černá linka na okraji. Ez nemcsak a szivárgás elleni védelmet, hanem a mozgás szabadságát is biztosítja. A szuper nedvszívó mag akár 12 órán át szárazon tartja a baba bőrét – védelem éjjel-nappal. items.raw_desc: Rajzprojektor Verk 18288 Festő projektor tartozékokkal, kék:The Verk 18288 Painting Projector in blue will be useful for all little artists from 3 years old who are just starting to draw. Includes 3 discs with thematic pictures that children can easily project and start drawing. This helps them to learn, for example, colours, shapes or the names of fruits, animals or vehicles. The Verk projector is height-adjustable, so your child can adjust it to their liking, and it folds completely flat, so it doesn't take up much space. It can also be used as a bedside lamp to give your little one a sense of security. It is also possible to remove the two front legs and use it as a drawing stand. A notebook and markers are also included.
